# snapcd_state_store (Resource)

Manages a State Store in Snap CD.


## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "snapcd_state_store" "my_state_store" {
  name = "MyStateStore"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique name of the State Store.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique ID of the State Store.
